mapper.sql: CASE WHEN u.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'WITHDRAWN' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM member_freeze mf WHERE mf.user_id = u.user_id AND CURDATE() BETWEEN mf.freeze_start AND mf.freeze_end) THEN 'FROZEN' WHEN u.is_active = 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'SUSPENDED' END

SELECT u.user_id AS id, u.email, u.role, up.name, up.contact AS phone, up.gender, up.birth_date, up.member_type, up.tier, up.trainer_id, tp.name AS trainer_name, up.pt_sessions_left, AS status, DATE(u.created_at) AS join_date, (SELECT start_date FROM membership ms WHERE ms.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY ms.end_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS membership_start, (SELECT end_date FROM membership ms WHERE ms.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY ms.end_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS membership_end, NULL AS memo FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles tp ON tp.user_id = up.trainer_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, MAX(attend_date) AS last_attend FROM attendance GROUP BY user_id) la ON la.user_id = u.user_id
JOIN user_gym ug ON ug.user_id = u.user_id AND ug.gym_id = #{gymId} AND ug.is_active = 1
WHERE u.role IN ('MEMBER', 'TRAINER')

sql.if: AND DATEDIFF((SELECT end_date FROM membership ms WHERE ms.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY ms.end_date DESC LIMIT 1), CURDATE()) >= #{minDaysLeft}
AND DATEDIFF((SELECT end_date FROM membership ms WHERE ms.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY ms.end_date DESC LIMIT 1), CURDATE()) <= #{maxDaysLeft}
AND (la.last_attend IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), la.last_attend) >= #{minAbsentDays})

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM user_gym WHERE user_id = #{id} AND gym_id = #{gymId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_id, email, role, is_active) VALUES (#{id}, #{email}, 'MEMBER', 1)
INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, name, contact, gender, birth_date, member_type, tier) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{memberType}, #{tier})
INSERT INTO member_freeze (user_id, freeze_start, freeze_end, reason) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{freezeStart}, #{freezeEnd}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, up.name AS member_name, f.freeze_start, f.freeze_end, f.reason, f.created_at FROM member_freeze f LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON f.user_id = up.user_id WHERE f.user_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY f.freeze_start DESC
SELECT ms.*, p.name AS product_name FROM membership ms LEFT JOIN product p ON ms.product_id = p.id WHERE ms.user_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY ms.start_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO membership (user_id, product_id, type, start_date, end_date, price, memo) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{productId}, #{type}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{price}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE membership SET end_date=#{endDate} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ms.id, ms.user_id, ms.type, ms.start_date, ms.end_date, p.name AS product_name, up.name AS member_name, up.contact AS member_phone, DATEDIFF(ms.end_date, CURDATE()) AS days_left FROM membership ms LEFT JOIN product p ON ms.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON ms.user_id = up.user_id WHERE ms.end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY ms.end_date ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM membership ms WHERE ms.end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT ticket_type AS ticketType, remaining FROM member_tickets WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ticket_type IN ('ONE_POINT', 'FEEDBACK') ORDER BY FIELD(ticket_type, 'ONE_POINT', 'FEEDBACK')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_tickets (user_id, ticket_type, remaining) VALUES (#{userId}, #{ticketType}, GREATEST(0, #{amount})) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE remaining = GREATEST(0, remaining + #{amount})
INSERT INTO ticket_logs (user_id, ticket_type, action_type, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{ticketType}, #{actionType}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE role = 'MEMBER' AND is_active = 1

SELECT mt.user_id AS member_id, up.name AS member_name, up.contact AS member_phone, up.tier, mt.remaining AS pt_remaining, tup.name AS trainer_name FROM member_tickets mt LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON mt.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN crm_member_assignments cma ON cma.member_id = mt.user_id LEFT JOIN crm_users cu ON cu.id = cma.trainer_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles tup ON cu.app_user_id = tup.user_id WHERE mt.ticket_type = 'ONE_POINT' AND mt.remaining < 5 ORDER BY mt.remaining ASC, up.name ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_tickets mt WHERE mt.ticket_type = 'ONE_POINT' AND mt.remaining < 5
